ticker: WIFI | ssid: Hybel 4-7 - password: 2GMeiendom26! | ssid: Leiligheter 201-304 - password: Mack2022! | If you have any questions contact Frank at +47 99 10 10 41 or frank@2gm.no

slides.content:
Welcome to Strandveien 112


The building includes 7 rooms and 11 fully equipped apartments.

Move-in / Move-out Procedure


All move-ins and move-outs must be coordinated with me.

Keys must always be handed over directly to Frank.

Parking


Do not park in a way that blocks access for the wheel loader during snow clearing in front of the entrance.

Electrical Waste Disposal


Electrical waste can be disposed of free of charge at Elkjøp (down between Elkjøp and the sea).

NO SMOKING!!!


Smoking is not permitted directly outside the front door. Cigarettes and other trash should not be thrown or left at the front door. It would be unnecessary for us to have to place cameras to get to the bottom of this.

Creating a Safe and Respectful Living Environment
This applies to both accommodation rigs and apartments.

Zero-tolerance policy:


• Bullying and harassment
• Discrimination and racism
• Gender-based violence
• Violence and threats
• Substance abuse

Respect for Each Other
• Show consideration
• Keep noise levels low
• Clean up after yourself
• Respect privacy
• Be inclusive

Reporting and Support


• Report issues to landlord
• Contact HR or whistleblower
• Employer is available for support

Together, we create a safe and positive place to live

– built on respect, responsibility, and care.
